protocol: Frozen encoder; C-LEG3 reference regime fixed; no AE/training; labels diagnostic-only for AUC/AP/autopsy; decomposition families are scalar, row, column, entry normal-manifold, complementarity, and proxy confound diagnostics.

old_exact_080_regime.definition: Legacy GT-3 reproduction: hop_attr descriptor, PCA-residual normal model, labeled-normal normal references, normal_soft_or anomaly scoring, descriptor-similarity anomaly references, GT_num_layers=3, full anomaly candidate pool.
